executives.name: George Burns
executives.background: George Burns has over 35 years of experience in the mineral sector including executive, operations and project development leadership roles. Prior to joining Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Goldcorp. He has also held positions at Centerra Gold Inc., Asarco LLC, and Cyprus Amax Minerals Company.

executives.name: John Webster
executives.background: John Webster is a Chartered Professional Accountant and former partner at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP with over 30 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: John Webster
board_of_directors.background: John Webster is a Chartered Professional Accountant and former partner at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP with over 30 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: Judith Mosely
board_of_directors.background: Judith Mosely has over 20 years of experience in the mining finance sector, including senior roles at Société Générale.
